meta.purpose: Post-Release Governance & Change Control Layer — Rules for maintaining V5.9 production system
meta.series: V5.9 TERMINAL — Governance applies to ALL post-release modifications

HOTFIX.label: Hotfix
HOTFIX.description: Critical bug fix only — production-breaking issue that causes crash, white screen, or data loss

STABILIZATION.label: Stabilization
STABILIZATION.description: Non-visual logic fix — state handling, data flow, error recovery
STABILIZATION.scope: logic layer only, no visual output changes

CONTENT_UPDATE.label: Content Update
CONTENT_UPDATE.description: Data-only change — text, images, scenic point data, narrative strings
CONTENT_UPDATE.scope: data assets only, no code logic changes

UI_PATCH.label: UI Patch
UI_PATCH.description: Visual-only change — spacing, color, typography, animation timing. No structural changes.
UI_PATCH.scope: visual tokens only: within LOCKED color/spacing/typography scales

MAJOR_CHANGE.label: Major Change
MAJOR_CHANGE.description: Structural or architectural change — FORBIDDEN in V5.9. Requires V6.0.
MAJOR_CHANGE.scope: ANY change outside the 4 allowed categories above

step_1_change_classification_system.enforcement: processChangeRequest() blocks MAJOR_CHANGE and unknown classifications

forbidden_patterns: new_page — Adding new pages to app.json
renderTree_schema_change — Adding/removing required fields from renderTree schema
visualEngine_modification — Changing visualEngine function signature or logic
lockdown_module_override — Modifying any file in core/visual/ registered as IMMUTABLE
new_visual_module — Adding new files to core/visual/ beyond the 10 frozen modules
pipeline_bypass — Rendering UI without passing through visualEngine → renderTree pipeline
experimental_path_introduction — Introducing any path matching EXPERIMENTAL_PATH_BLOCKLIST patterns

approval_requirements: impact_score_assessment — Evaluate surface area of change across modules and pages
visual_regression_risk_check — Run visual regression guard against modified renderTree
state_compatibility_check — Verify state-to-UI mapping unchanged for all 5 state profiles
immutable_module_check — Verify no IMMUTABLE module is being modified
rejection_rules: IF change is MAJOR_CHANGE → BLOCK (requires V6.0)
IF change modifies an IMMUTABLE module → BLOCK (requires V6.0)
IF impact_score > 5 (high) or unknown → require senior review
IF visual regression guard fails → BLOCK until resolved
IF state compatibility fails → BLOCK until resolved
IF impact score cannot be determined → BLOCK (requires manual review)
step_3_change_entry_gate.enforcement: processChangeRequest() validates classification, structural audit, impact, regression, state, and immutability

drift_dimensions: spacing_drift — Values outside locked rpx scale
typography_drift — Font sizes outside locked typography scale
layout_deviation — Unapproved renderTree keys, missing hero
color_token_misuse — Non-approved hex colors, unapproved rgba opacities
hierarchy_imbalance — Missing layers, competing hero objects
step_4_visual_drift_monitor.enforcement: checkForDrift() evaluates all 5 dimensions; shouldFallback=true on CRITICAL drift or 5+ drifts

fallback_levels.name: MINIMAL_FALLBACK_TREE
fallback_levels.description: Single line of text — used when page data is completely missing

fallback_levels.name: SAFE_FALLBACK_TREE
fallback_levels.description: Empty state with world narrative — used when basic structure exists but content is missing

fallback_levels.name: STABLE_FALLBACK_TREE
fallback_levels.description: Default hero with empty section — used when page structure is partially available

step_5_safe_fallback_mode.enforcement: enforceSafeFallback() checks stability, activates safe mode on instability, returns appropriate fallback tree

allowed_in_v59.ui_patches: YES — visual token changes within locked scales

step_6_version_discipline_rule.enforcement: Change classification system + forbidden patterns + change request gate = triple enforcement

metrics_monitored: visual_stability_score — Module loading and configuration status
drift_frequency — Per-dimension drift counters and log size
state_to_UI_mismatch_rate — Estimated mismatch rate from fallbacks and drifts
system_integrity_status — Module immutability, style mode, release seal, governance modules

governance_files_created.purpose: Change classification, structural audit, impact scoring, approval workflow
3-level fallback trees, neutral palette, animation disablement
Periodic health report generator with 5 system metrics

evidence: All changes classified into 5 categories (HOTFIX, STABILIZATION, CONTENT_UPDATE, UI_PATCH, MAJOR_CHANGE)
Change request gate blocks MAJOR_CHANGE and unapproved classifications
5 approval requirements enforced per change
Impact scoring system (1-5) determines approval path
9 forbidden structural patterns defined and enforced
All forbidden patterns automatically reclassified as V6.0 scope
Immutable module modification is BLOCKED at the gate level
Pipeline bypass detection: rendering without visualEngine → renderTree sequence is forbidden
5-dimensional drift monitor active (spacing, typography, layout, color, hierarchy)
Locked baselines defined for all visual dimensions
Drift behavior: WARNING → auto-log, CRITICAL → trigger safe fallback
Drift counters tracked; comprehensive check evaluates all dimensions per render
3-level safe fallback system (minimal → safe → stable)
Safe mode forces minimal layout, neutral palette, disabled animations
System stability check prevents white screen on null/corrupt renderTree
Fallback trees provide meaningful world narrative even in degraded state
Total fallbacks tracked; drift+fallback combined → state-to-UI mismatch rate
Version discipline rule: V5.9 = patch only, no feature expansion, no new systems
All 10 visual modules declared IMMUTABLE with V6.0+ requirement
Release seal terminal: any change outside 4 approved categories → V6.0
Periodic health reporting monitors system integrity (current score: 100/100)
Governance + production lock + RC freeze + regression guard = quadruple safety net

summary.release_readiness: V5.9 series is TERMINAL. Post-release governance layer active. All changes must pass through change control gate.
summary.next_version: V6.0+ for any structural or architectural change
